summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of content updates from real company PDFs. All pages successfully updated with authentic data from Western Product Catalogue and Electrogrupo Presentation.
passed_tests: About Us page displays correct stats: 30+ years, 60+ collaborators, 20+ vehicles, 5700m² plant
About Us page timeline shows all milestones from 1990 to 2026
About Us page has two location cards (Santa Rita Casa Matriz and Katueté Sucursal)
About Us page brands section contains real descriptions with ISO 9001, iControl, and high performance pumps mentions
Western brand page shows real data: 25000+ pivots, 80 countries, 15000h guarantee
Western brand page has updated product descriptions (CP600, iControl, Permapipe)
Riego por Pivot page contains real technical specs from catalogue (tramo lengths, pipe diameters, GPS precision)
CONSILOS brand page mentions ISO 9001 certification in title and description
IMBIL brand page mentions high performance pumps for large flow rates
All navigation between pages works correctly
Homepage carousel and navigation menu function properly
All brand links and service buttons are clickable and functional
